MILO

Je voelt de bass, je vergeet de tijd
House · Techno · Deep
01

IDENTITY

Milo is the deep, immersive side of PicYourBooth. Where other DJs bring energy and sing-alongs, Milo builds architectural sets that pull the listener underwater. Late-night, hypnotic, relentless.

Milo - Cyan #22d3ee - House, Techno, Deep
DJ Gianni - Coral #f0654a - Afro Beats, Caribbean, Nederlands, Hits
  • Name: Milo
  • Tagline: "Je voelt de bass, je vergeet de tijd"
  • Genres: House, Techno, Deep
  • Color: Cyan #22d3ee
  • Shape: Diamond (rhombus)
  • Vibe: Deep, underwater, immersive, late-night, architectural sets

Milo bouwt sets van deep house naar hypnotiserende techno. Elke transitie naadloos, elk nummer strategisch gekozen. Zijn sets voelen als onderdompeling - je vergeet de tijd, je vergeet de ruimte. Het enige wat overblijft is de bass en het ritme.

02

COLOR PALETTE

All colors are defined as CSS custom properties. Milo's cyan is the primary DJ accent. Dim variants (10% opacity) are used for tag backgrounds and hover states.

Backgrounds
Void
#050508
Surface / Card
#111116
Border
rgba(255,255,255,0.06)
Text
White
#ededf0
Muted
40% white
Subtle
10% white
Milo (Primary for this guide)
Cyan / --mi
#22d3ee
Cyan Light
#5ae0f0
Cyan Dim
10% cyan
Secondary & Shared Accents
Violet
#8b5cf6
Gold (Nav CTA only)
#d4b14e
Gianni Coral (ref)
#f0654a

Gold (#d4b14e) is reserved exclusively for the nav CTA button "BOEK JE ERVARING". It never appears as a section heading or DJ accent color.

03

LOGO MARK

The M diamond is Milo's signature mark - a 45-degree rotated square (rhombus). Angular, geometric, underground. It differentiates his personal DJ brand from the PYB web system (which uses rounded rectangles). The diamond connects to Milo's architectural, precise approach to mixing.

M
Cyan on Dark
M
Dark on Cyan
M
White on Dark
M
Favicon / Small

The diamond is for Milo's personal brand (mixtape covers, social profiles, merch). On the PYB website, the rounded-square variant is used inline within UI components.

M
MILO
"Je voelt de bass, je vergeet de tijd"

CSS Diamond Shape

.diamond { width: 80px; height: 80px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0% 50%); font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 32px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
04

TYPOGRAPHY

Two fonts only. Bebas Neue for display/headings, Space Grotesk for everything else. No Oswald. No Montserrat. All fonts loaded via Google Fonts.

Display XL
Bebas Neue, 80px
letter-spacing: 0.04em
MILO
Display LG
Bebas Neue, 48px
letter-spacing: 0.04em
MILO
Display MD
Bebas Neue, 28px
letter-spacing: 0.06em
RECENTE SETS
Nav / Button
Bebas Neue, 15px
letter-spacing: 0.06em
BOEK JE ERVARING
Body
Space Grotesk, 15px
font-weight: 300–400
Milo bouwt sets van deep house naar hypnotiserende techno. Elke transitie naadloos, elk nummer strategisch gekozen.
Body SM
Space Grotesk, 14px
color: 55% white
Zijn sets voelen als onderdompeling - je vergeet de tijd, je vergeet de ruimte.
Tagline
Space Grotesk, 18px
italic, color: --mi
Je voelt de bass, je vergeet de tijd
Label / Tag
Space Grotesk, 11px
uppercase, 600
House • Techno • Deep
Gradient Text
Bebas Neue, 48px
DEEP INTO THE NIGHT
05

GENRE TAGS

Pill-shaped genre tags in Milo's cyan. Dim background (10% opacity) with light text. Three sizes for different contexts.

Default Size

Milo Tags (Cyan Dim BG + Cyan Light Text)
House Techno Deep

Large Size

For hero sections and featured areas
House Techno Deep

Small Size

For compact cards and lists
House Techno Deep

Mixed Context

Milo tags alongside violet shared tags
House Techno Deep DJ Set Live
06

SOCIAL BIOS

Pre-written bio text for Milo's social media profiles. Consistent tone: minimal, confident, no filler.

TIKTOK
Milo House · Techno · Deep Je voelt de bass, je vergeet de tijd Boekingen: info@picyourbooth.nl
SOUNDCLOUD
Milo - DJ uit Nederland. Bouwt sets van deep house naar hypnotiserende techno. Elke transitie naadloos, elk nummer strategisch. Boekingen: info@picyourbooth.nl
INSTAGRAM
Milo House · Techno Deep beats, strakke sets Boekingen via link in bio
07

PROFILE PHOTO DIRECTION

Guidelines for Milo's profile photography. The photo should feel like looking into deep water - dark, blue-tinted, immersive.

Visual Direction

  • Moody, blue-tinted studio-style photography
  • Dark background with subtle cyan/blue lighting from below or side
  • Headphones on or around neck - authentic DJ posture
  • Underwater/deep feel: think submerged, floating, weightless
  • No direct flash, no bright environments
  • B&W base with cyan color grade overlay

Technical Specs

  • Square format preferred (1:1), minimum 800x800px
  • Border-radius: 24px (--r-xl) in UI context
  • Subtle cyan gradient glow at bottom edge
  • EQ bars overlay: 5 bars, absolute bottom-right, cyan

Mood Keywords

Deep - Underwater - Immersive - Architectural - Late-night - Hypnotic

08

UI COMPONENTS

Key UI components from the DJ design system, shown with Milo's cyan accent applied.

DJ Card

The DJ card is the primary showcase component. Photo area with cyan gradient overlay, EQ bars animation, accent dot, large Bebas Neue name, genre tags, social icons, and play button.

MILO
"Je voelt de bass, je vergeet de tijd"
House Techno Deep
Bouwt sets van deep house naar hypnotiserende techno. Elke transitie naadloos, elk nummer strategisch.
IG TT SC

EQ Bars

Animated equalizer bars in cyan. Positioned absolute, bottom-right of photo areas and avatars. 5 bars, 4px wide, staggered animation delay.

Buttons

Pill-shaped, Bebas Neue, letter-spacing 0.06em

Social Icons

Hover state uses cyan dim background + cyan text
IG TT SC

Play Button

Solid cyan circle, dark play triangle
09

How Milo's brand elements combine in real-world contexts: social posts, set artwork, and the profile layout.

M
MILO
House · Techno · Deep

SOCIAL POST
Square format (1:1). Diamond mark top-center, name dominant, genre tags below. Dark void background with subtle cyan glow at bottom.
Milo presents
DEEP INTO THE NIGHT
House Techno
01:48:00
SET ARTWORK
SoundCloud/Mixcloud cover. Gradient text title, small genre tags, subtle cyan-to-violet gradient background. Duration bottom-left.

Profile Layout

Full profile with avatar, large name, tagline, bio, genre tags, socials, and set list.

M

MILO

"Je voelt de bass, je vergeet de tijd"

Milo bouwt sets van deep house naar hypnotiserende techno. Elke transitie naadloos, elk nummer strategisch gekozen. Zijn sets voelen als onderdompeling - je vergeet de tijd, je vergeet de ruimte.

Afterhours RotterdamLate-night • Club • 200 bezoekers
3:15:00
10

DESIGN RULES

Non-negotiable rules for maintaining Milo's visual identity within the PicYourBooth system.

01
Two fonts only: Bebas Neue (display) and Space Grotesk (body). Never use Oswald, Montserrat, or any other typeface.
02
Cyan (#22d3ee) is Milo's signature. Always used for: DJ name, EQ bars, genre tag backgrounds, play buttons, social icon hovers.
03
Never mix Milo cyan with Gianni coral on the same component. Each DJ element gets exactly one accent color.
04
Backgrounds are always --void (#050508) or --surface (#111116). No pure black (#000) or dark grays. The system is tinted.
05
Typography is the design. Whitespace is luxury. The M diamond is the one bold graphic element - everything else stays minimal.
06
The M diamond is for Milo's personal brand (covers, social, merch). PYB website UI uses rounded rectangles from the token scale: 6px (sm) to 999px (pill).
07
"Je voelt de bass, je vergeet de tijd" is Milo's tagline. It appears consistently across all touchpoints as the primary brand line.
08
Gradient text (cyan > violet) is for hero titles only. Never on body text, tags, or buttons. Applied via background-clip: text.
09
Dim color variants (10% opacity) are for tag backgrounds and hover states only. Never use full-opacity cyan as a background fill on large areas.
10
Gold (#d4b14e) is reserved for the nav CTA "BOEK JE ERVARING". It never appears as a section heading or DJ accent color.
11
The diamond shape uses clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0% 50%). Never approximate with rotation transforms - always use the clip-path.
12
Shared PYB elements (nav, footer, booking wizard, Spotify section) use violet or neutral tokens. Milo's cyan only appears on Milo-specific components.
-

CSS VARIABLE REFERENCE

Complete token reference for implementing Milo's brand in code. Copy these into any project to maintain consistency.

:root { /* Backgrounds */ --void: #050508; --surface: #111116; --card: #111116; --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); /* Text */ --white: #ededf0; --muted: rgba(237,237,240,0.40); --subtle: rgba(237,237,240,0.10); /* Milo */ --mi: #22d3ee; --mi-light: #5ae0f0; --mi-dim: rgba(34,211,238,0.10); /* DJ Gianni (for reference) */ --gi: #f0654a; --gi-light: #f4826c; --gi-dim: rgba(240,101,74,0.10); /* Shared accents */ --violet: #8b5cf6; --violet-dim: rgba(139,92,246,0.12); --gold: #d4b14e; /* Typography */ --font-display: 'Bebas Neue', Impact, sans-serif; --font-body: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; /* Animation */ --ease: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); /* Radius scale */ --r-sm: 6px; --r-md: 10px; --r-lg: 16px; --r-xl: 24px; --r-pill: 999px; }
PICYOURBOOTH

Milo - Brand Guide - 2026
